variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of Sales. The explicit depreciation/amortization rows in the cost section appear to be sub-components already embedded in that selected total, as shown by the accompanying balancing row. To avoid double counting, no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket is the combined sum of [Income Statement] Selling and Distribution Expenses and [Income Statement] Administration Expenses. The visible D&A rows are nested component lines within those selected parent rows, with balancing rows indicating inclusion. XRD is empty and no separate R&D row is visible, but there is also no explicit amortization-in-R&D line to consider. Therefore no separate SG&A D&A row should be added.
